topic: Product-demo short for Content Machine, an open-source local-first short-form video toolkit for coding agents. Show the problem: topic-to-video agents are usually opaque. Demo the solution: repo-local skills and flows create script, audio, timestamps, visuals, captions, render metadata, and publish-prep review as inspectable files. End with: clone it, run diagnostics, then run generate-short. Avoid claims about guaranteed virality, hands-off publishing, or perfect quality without review.

visuals.topic: developer terminal coding agent video editing workflow
